lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: Hello! Welcome to the Twisted League. I see you are new here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, this is my first League. Can you explain how they work?

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: I'd be happy to!

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: First of all, I'm your Leagues Tutor. If you have any questions about how Leagues work, you can come to me for help.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: Now, Leagues are time-limited modes that give you a new way to play the game. For this League, you are restricted to the Kourend and Kebos regions, and you play as an Iron Man.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: Let's take a look at all of the information available about this League. There is a new section in the journal tab whilst on a Leagues world. Click on the flashing quest icon to take a look.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: Now that you have your journal open, click on the flashing Leagues icon.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: This is the Leagues menu. Here you can view your progress through the current League. You can also open the various Leagues interfaces from here.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: Your objective in each League is to complete tasks and earn League Points.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: Tasks are split into five difficulty levels: Easy, Medium, Hard, Elite and Master. The harder the task, the more points awarded.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: Let's have a look at the tasks interface now. Click on the flashing button to open it.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: This is the tasks interface. Here you can see all the tasks available to you in this League. When you are ready to continue, close the interface by clicking on the cross in the corner of it.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: Earning points during the League will allow you to unlock powerful Twisted Relics. The more League Points you have, the more Relics available to you.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: League Points are also transferred over to your main profile. There, they can be spent on rewards in the Leagues Reward Shop.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: Now let's have a look at the Twisted Relics. Click on the flashing button to take a look at the Relics interface.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: This is the Relics interface. Here you can unlock new Twisted Relics to be used during this League. When you are ready to continue, close the interface by clicking on the cross in the corner of it.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: There are a few changes to Kourend and Kebos which you may not be used to. You can view all of these changes on the information interface.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: Right, I think that's everything. If you need reminding of any of this information, you can either talk to me or read the information interface.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: Before you head off though, it's time to pick your first Relic! Choose carefully though, once you've picked a Relic you can't go back and change your decision.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: Hi there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello, who are you?

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: I'm the Tutor for Old School Leagues.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's a League?

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: Old School Leagues are time-limited game modes that are separate from your main profile.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: With each League, you start afresh, with a limited amount of time to progress through the game mode.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So it's a fresh start? Why would I want that?

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: Glory, gold, and the chance to play the game in a different way!

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: First up, the glory. Within a League, you can earn League Points by completing various tasks.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: The more points you have at the end of the League, the better League Rank you will be given.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: Each League Rank will unlock a trophy for you. These trophies can be used to show off how well you did.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: If that doesn't interest you, how about gold! When you earn League Points, they will be transferred over to your main profile.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: These points can be used to buy things from the Leagues Reward Shop. You can keep these purchases for yourself or sell them on to other players!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: And if glory and gold don't interest me?

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: Leagues aren't just a copy of the normal game. Every League has unique rules and features to set it aside from the game you're used to.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: Not only that, but within each League, you can unlock powerful artefacts known as Relics. These Relics completely change the way you play the game!

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: So even if glory and gold are not for you, you'll still find Leagues to be a whole lot of fun!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see, thanks for the information.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: My pleasure!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is there currently a League running?

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: No, The most recent League was the Twisted League. You can now claim your trophies from the Twisted League and purchase rewards using your League points.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: League trophies are a representation of how well you did in a specific League. Performance is judged on the number of League points you earned compared to everyone else who participated.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: There are seven tiers of Trophy: Bronze, Iron, Steel, Mithril, Adamant, Rune and Dragon. Each League trophy has a logo on the front so you can tell which League it was awarded from.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are the League point cut-offs for the Twisted League?

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: Bronze trophy: 10 points, Iron trophy: 80 points, Steel trophy: 510 points, Mithril trophy: 1770 points.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: Adamant trophy: 5270 points, Rune trophy: 10820 points and the Dragon Trophy: 20830 points.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: You earned 0 League points which does not qualify you for any trophy.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: You earned [number] League points which qualifies you for the all of the Twisted League trophies up to and including the Twisted [type] trophy!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I purchase my League rewards?

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: Certainly, I have a number of unique rewards which you can purchase using points earned competing in a League. Here is what is available.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to claim my League trophies.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: You have not earned any League trophies. If you want a League trophy you should participate next time a League comes around!

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: Of course, here are the trophies you have earned.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: You do not have enough space for all the League trophies you can claim. Come back to me when you have more space.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: You have already claimed all of the League trophies which you have earned.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Goodbye.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: All the best.
